title: JFrog Platform User
description: Represents a user account in the JFrog Platform, managed by the Access service for authentication and authorization across all JFrog services.

username.description: Unique username identifying the user across the platform

admin.description: Whether the user has platform administrator privileges

profile_updatable.description: Whether the user can update their own profile information

disable_ui_access.description: Whether browser-based UI access is disabled for this user

internal_password_disabled.description: Whether internal password authentication is disabled (forces external auth)

realm.description: Authentication realm indicating the identity provider

last_logged_in.description: Timestamp of the user's last login

created.description: Timestamp when the user account was created
